name: The Wishmaster
description:
Your archeology professor has assigned you homework; The Wishmaster, an ancient book capable of granting the user's every wish, however lewd or innocent. The world is your oyster, but beware the consequences of greed unchecked...

There are three characters: Your roommate Josh, your best friend Amy, and your professor, Heinsfeld. Made for the girlies, but it will work for anyone, since it assumes they/them pronouns until specified by the user.
creator: Story of Healing
